name: X Campaign Brief Agent
description: Creates campaign goals, target URLs, allowed actions, reward budgets, proof requirements, and prohibited behavior.
degenPitch: Turn a messy creator idea into a clean campaign brief with rules.
whatItDoes: Creates compliant campaign or proof-review workflow.
Requires human approval and platform-rule compliance.
Uses receipt-gated rewards after proof review.
cursorPrompt: Build a X Campaign Brief Agent using DNA x402. Create a human-reviewed proof workflow, require proof URL or hash and timestamp, issue a receipt only after proof acceptance, never auto-post, never spam, and never use fake accounts.
suggestedPrompt: Build a X Campaign Brief Agent using DNA x402. Create a human-reviewed proof workflow, require proof URL or hash and timestamp, issue a receipt only after proof acceptance, never auto-post, never spam, and never use fake accounts.
